dashboard.label: ZeroQ — Compliance
dashboard.description: ZeroQ posture mapped to NIST, NSA and CISA deadlines.

search.query: | index=crypto_source sourcetype=zeroq:crypto_finding earliest=-90d | lookup zeroq_compliance_mapping rule OUTPUT framework | stats count by framework
| index=crypto_source sourcetype=zeroq:crypto_finding earliest=-90d | lookup zeroq_compliance_mapping rule OUTPUT framework, authority, desc | stats count by framework, rule, desc | sort -count
